## Current Task
Redesigning the context management trigger mechanism — **implementation and testing complete**. All code changes build and pass tests. Three bugs identified: Bug #1 (`isTool` role mismatch) and Bug #2 (compact summary not persisted) are **unfixed**. Bug #3 (trigger never firing) is **FIXED**. Additional refactoring of `checkpoint_io.go` and `reconstruction.go` completed — checkpoints now save/load `recent_messages.jsonl`, enabling efficient snapshot reconstruction from checkpoint instead of full journal replay.

## Files Involved
- `/Users/genius/project/ai/pkg/context/trigger.go`: **REWRITTEN** — token-tiered `ShouldTrigger`
- `/Users/genius/project/ai/pkg/context/trigger_config.go`: **REWRITTEN** — `TokenUrgent=0.70`, `TokenHigh=0.50`, `TokenMedium=0.30`, `TokenLow=0.20`, intervals: `1/5/15/30`
- `/Users/genius/project/ai/pkg/context/agent_state.go`: **MODIFIED** — added `ToolCallsSinceLastTrigger int`, updated `Clone()`
- `/Users/genius/project/ai/pkg/context/trigger_test.go`: **REWRITTEN** — new tier-based trigger tests (all passing)
- `/Users/genius/project/ai/pkg/context/checkpoint_io.go`: **MODIFIED** — saves/loads `messages.jsonl` in checkpoints; added `saveMessagesJSONL`, `loadMessagesJSONL`, `splitLines` helpers; added `bytes` import
- `/Users/genius/project/ai/pkg/context/reconstruction.go`: **MODIFIED** — `ReconstructSnapshotWithCheckpoint` loads messages from checkpoint then replays only entries after `checkpoint.MessageIndex`; `ReconstructSnapshotMessages` no longer clears existing messages
- `/Users/genius/project/ai/pkg/agent/loop_normal.go`: **MODIFIED** — `ToolCallsSinceLastTrigger += len(toolResults)` after tool calls; Bug #1 at line 154 still unfixed
- `/Users/genius/project/ai/pkg/agent/turn.go`: **MODIFIED** — `ToolCallsSinceLastTrigger = 0` reset in `executeContextMgmtStep`
- `/Users/genius/project/ai/pkg/agent/loop_context_mgmt.go`: **MODIFIED** — state display uses "Tool calls since last management", reset in `executeNoAction`
- `/Users/genius/project/ai/pkg/agent/agent_new.go`: **MODIFIED** — reset in `resetTurnTracking`; Bug #2 (`performCompaction`) still unfixed
- `/Users/genius/project/ai/pkg/agent/context_mgmt_fast_test.go`: **MODIFIED** — updated trigger tests for new logic (all passing)
- `/Users/genius/project/ai/pkg/agent/e2e_suite_test.go`: **MODIFIED** — updated test names and logic for new trigger mechanism
- `/Users/genius/project/ai/pkg/tools/context_mgmt/no_action.go`: **MODIFIED** — reset `ToolCallsSinceLastTrigger = 0`
- `/Users/genius/project/ai/pkg/llm/context_mgmt_input.go`: **MODIFIED** — added "Tool calls since last management"
- `/Users/genius/project/ai/pkg/context/events.go`: **MODIFIED** — added `tool_calls_since_last_trigger` to log output
- `/Users/genius/project/ai/design/context_snapshot_architecture.md`: Design document confirming checkpoint should save messages and resume should only replay after `MessageIndex`

## Key Code Elements
- `ShouldTrigger(snapshot)`: checks `tokenPercent` against tiers (urgent/high/medium/low), then checks `ToolCallsSinceLastTrigger >= intervalForTier`
- Token tiers: <20% minimal, 20-30% periodic, 30-50% normal, 50-70% aggressive, 70%+ urgent
- Tool call intervals: urgent=1, high=5, medium=15, low=30
- Stale output fallback: below 20%, still trigger if `CountStaleOutputs(10) >= 15` and interval met
- `SaveCheckpoint`: now saves `messages.jsonl` alongside `llm_context.txt` and `agent_state.json`
- `LoadCheckpoint`: loads messages from `messages.jsonl` if present (backward compatible with old checkpoints)
- `ReconstructSnapshotWithCheckpoint`: loads checkpoint messages, then replays only `journalEntries[checkpoint.MessageIndex:]`
- `ReconstructSnapshotMessages`: no longer clears existing messages (preserves checkpoint-loaded messages)

## Errors Encountered
- **Bug #1 (UNFIXED)**: `isTool := msg.Role == "tool"` at `loop_normal.go:154` doesn't match `"toolResult"` → empty tool results skipped → corrupts message sequence → `findValidSuffix` drops all history. Fix: `isTool := msg.Role == "tool" || msg.Role == "toolResult"`
- **Bug #2 (UNFIXED)**: `performCompaction` sets `snapshot.LLMContext` in memory but never persists to disk (no `WriteContent`/`SaveCompactionSummary`/journal compact event)
- **Bug #3 (FIXED)**: Context management never triggered — `TotalTurns=1 < MinTurns=5` blocked all triggers. Root cause: turn-based design inappropriate since single turn produces many tool calls. Redesigned to tool-call-based token-tiered triggers.

## Decisions Made
- Trigger based on tool call count, NOT turns (user: "一轮中会有许多许多次的工具调用")
- Token usage tiers determine trigger aggressiveness (user: "20%以上就可以开始 truncate 旧的", "30%的时候触发的频率应该更激进")
- Keep `TurnsSinceLastTrigger` as legacy field (not removed to avoid breaking code)
- Old config constants (`MinTurns`, `IntervalTurns`, `MinInterval`, `TokenThreshold`) replaced by new tier constants
- Checkpoints save messages as JSONL for efficient reconstruction (per design document: "resume should load checkpoint, then apply journal entries after MessageIndex")
- Backward compatible: old checkpoints without `messages.jsonl` still work (falls back to empty messages)

## What's Complete
1. Diagnosed Bug #1 root cause: `isTool := msg.Role == "tool"` mismatch with `"toolResult"` at line 154 of `loop_normal.go`
2. Traced full Bug #1 causal chain from trace events #179 (178KB/92 msgs) → #188 (empty go build) → #198 (4KB/3 msgs)
3. Confirmed Bug #1 fix: `isTool := msg.Role == "tool" || msg.Role == "toolResult"`
4. Found that `overview.md` is empty template — compact summary never written
5. Found that `messages.jsonl` has NO compact event entries
6. Identified `performCompaction` doesn't call `WriteContent` or `SaveCompactionSummary`
7. Diagnosed Bug #3: Context management never triggered because `TotalTurns=1 < MinTurns=5` blocks all triggers
8. Rewrote trigger mechanism: New token-tiered + tool-call-interval design in `trigger.go` and `trigger_config.go`
9. Added `ToolCallsSinceLastTrigger` to `AgentState`, updated increment/reset in all relevant files
10. Rewrote `trigger_test.go` with new token escalation tests — all passing
11. Updated `context_mgmt_fast_test.go` and `e2e_suite_test.go` for new trigger logic — all passing
12. Build succeeds, all `pkg/context` and `pkg/agent` fast unit tests pass
13. Refactored `checkpoint_io.go`: SaveCheckpoint now saves `messages.jsonl`; LoadCheckpoint loads it back. Added `saveMessagesJSONL`, `loadMessagesJSONL`, `splitLines` helpers.
14. Refactored `reconstruction.go`: `ReconstructSnapshotWithCheckpoint` now loads messages from checkpoint first, then replays only journal entries after `checkpoint.MessageIndex`. `ReconstructSnapshotMessages` no longer clears existing messages.

## Next Steps
1. Fix Bug #1: change `loop_normal.go` line 154 to `isTool := msg.Role == "tool" || msg.Role == "toolResult"`
2. Fix Bug #2: add persistence to `performCompaction` so compact summary writes to disk (llm_context.txt + journal compact event)
3. Add regression test for Bug #1 (empty tool result not being filtered)

## User Requirements
- Investigate why `/compact` summary is not written to `llm_context.txt` (overview.md)
- Check if `messages.jsonl` records compact events
- Both bugs need fixing: (1) `isTool` role mismatch, (2) compact summary not persisted
- Trigger mechanism must be based on tool call count, not turns
- Token usage tiers: <20% minimal, ≥20% start truncating, ≥30% more aggressive frequency tied to token rate
